{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/3466247?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Keyvanhardani", "id": 3466247, "login": "Keyvanhardani", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM0NjYyNDc=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Keyvanhardani", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48015", "cvss": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "SVG files are in the `allowed_extensions` whitelist and can be uploaded by any admin user via the media manager. There is zero SVG content sanitization anywhere in the upload pipeline. A malicious SVG with JavaScript (`onload`, `<script>`, `<foreignObject>`) executes in the context of the Shopware domain when accessed.

## The Problem

In `src/Core/Framework/Resources/config/packages/shopware.yaml`, line 194:

```yaml
allowed_extensions: ["jpg", "jpeg", "png", "webp", "avif", "gif", "svg", ...]
```

SVG is whitelisted. The upload path (`MediaUploadController` → `FileSaver` → `TypeDetector`) recognizes SVG as `ImageType` with `VECTOR_GRAPHIC` flag, but no code strips JavaScript, event handlers, or external entity references from the SVG XML.

A search of the entire codebase for SVG sanitization returns — no `DOMPurify`, no `svg-sanitize`, no `strip_tags` on SVG content, nothing.

## Impact

Stored XSS affecting all users who view the uploaded SVG. In an e-commerce context, this can lead to admin account takeover, customer data theft, or malicious plugin installation.

## Suggested Fix

Either:

1. **Remove SVG from `allowed_extensions`** if SVG upload is not a core requirement
2. **Sanitize SVG content** on upload using a library like `enshrined/svg-sanitize` (strips scripts, event handlers, external references)
3. **Serve SVGs with `Content-Disposition: attachment`** to prevent inline rendering
4. **Serve SVGs from a separate domain** (like Nextcloud's `usercontent.apps.nextcloud.com`)

Option 2 is the most practical — `enshrined/svg-sanitize` is already used by WordPress and other PHP projects.

Regards & BG,
Keyvan Hardani", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00278, "percentile": 0.19822}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xvhc-gm7j-mhmc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T19:35:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xvhc-gm7j-mhmc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xvhc-gm7j-mhmc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48015"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-04T19:35:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/shopware/shopware/security/advisories/GHSA-xvhc-gm7j-mhmc", "https://github.com/shopware/shopware/releases/tag/v6.6.10.18", "https://github.com/shopware/shopware/releases/tag/v6.7.10.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xvhc-gm7j-mhmc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/shopware/shopware/security-advisories/GHSA-xvhc-gm7j-mhmc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/shopware/shopware", "summary": "Shopware: Stored XSS via SVG file upload — no SVG sanitization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T19:35:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xvhc-gm7j-mhmc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.7.10.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "shopware/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.7.0.0, < 6.7.10.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.6.10.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "shopware/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.6.10.18"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.7.10.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "shopware/platform"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.7.0.0, < 6.7.10.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.6.10.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "shopware/platform"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.6.10.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Shopware: Stored XSS via SVG file upload — no SVG sanitization
